detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Ultima._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Ultima.sol#641-765):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (Ultima.sol#705)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (Ultima.sol#779-791)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (Ultima.sol#711)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount.mul(3).div(5)) (Ultima.sol#799)
		- _developmentAddress.transfer(amount.mul(2).div(5)) (Ultima.sol#801)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (Ultima.sol#763)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (Ultima.sol#927)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (Ultima.sol#907)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (Ultima.sol#909)
	Ultima._rOwned (Ultima.sol#319) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Ultima._takeTeam(uint256) (Ultima.sol#921-929)
	- Ultima._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (Ultima.sol#881-917)
	- Ultima.balanceOf(address) (Ultima.sol#467-471)
	- Ultima.constructor() (Ultima.sol#401-431)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (Ultima.sol#763)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (Ultima.sol#935)
	Ultima._rTotal (Ultima.sol#331) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Ultima._getCurrentSupply() (Ultima.sol#1077-1087)
	- Ultima._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (Ultima.sol#933-939)
	- Ultima.constructor() (Ultima.sol#401-431)
	- Ultima.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (Ultima.sol#563-585)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [Ultima._transfer(address,address,uint256)](Ultima.sol#L641-L765):
	External calls:
	- [swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance)](Ultima.sol#L705)
		- [uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp)](Ultima.sol#L779-L791)
	External calls sending eth:
	- [sendETHToFee(address(this).balance)](Ultima.sol#L711)
		- [_marketingAddress.transfer(amount.mul(3).div(5))](Ultima.sol#L799)
		- [_developmentAddress.transfer(amount.mul(2).div(5))](Ultima.sol#L801)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](Ultima.sol#L763)
		- [_rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam)](Ultima.sol#L927)
		- [_rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount)](Ultima.sol#L907)
		- [_rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount)](Ultima.sol#L909)
	[Ultima._rOwned](Ultima.sol#L319) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [Ultima._takeTeam(uint256)](Ultima.sol#L921-L929)
	- [Ultima._transferStandard(address,address,uint256)](Ultima.sol#L881-L917)
	- [Ultima.balanceOf(address)](Ultima.sol#L467-L471)
	- [Ultima.constructor()](Ultima.sol#L401-L431)
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](Ultima.sol#L763)
		- [_rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee)](Ultima.sol#L935)
	[Ultima._rTotal](Ultima.sol#L331) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [Ultima._getCurrentSupply()](Ultima.sol#L1077-L1087)
	- [Ultima._reflectFee(uint256,uint256)](Ultima.sol#L933-L939)
	- [Ultima.constructor()](Ultima.sol#L401-L431)
	- [Ultima.tokenFromReflection(uint256)](Ultima.sol#L563-L585)

		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (Ultima.sol#779-791)
	External calls sending eth:
	- _transfer(sender,recipient,amount) (Ultima.sol#539)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount.mul(3).div(5)) (Ultima.sol#799)
		- _developmentAddress.transfer(amount.mul(2).div(5)) (Ultima.sol#801)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _approve(sender,_msgSender(),_allowances[sender][_msgSender()].sub(amount,ERC20: transfer amount exceeds allowance)) (Ultima.sol#541-555)
		- _allowances[owner][spender] = amount (Ultima.sol#633)
